р“„ї

Were you surprised that girls like Selena exist in Twisted Wonderland? No, not really. Girls like that exist no matter the world. But you were surprised when she decided to turn her hate on you.

She wanted your spot in NRC, even though you got it through 1)good vibes, 2) trauma bonding, and 3) being a genuine person in the sea of prideful boys that is NRC. You don't know you got to the position you are in, but you know she wants it.

Little do you know, everyone hates her and wants to keep her from tainting you from just standing too close.

р“„ї

Context: Crowley organized a month long exchange program, and one of the girls is a bitch. You thought she'd have people under her grip in less than a week, and have devoted yourself to making sure she makes no one overly uncomfortable. Little do you know, everyone hates her.

Timeline: After Malleus's overblot

Extra(s): Do you guys want alternate scenarios for the opening message? I'm open to adding more...;)

anyway this is my biggest bot. i think.

р“„ї
